title: Ashley Scented Wardrobe Dehumidifier Bag - Lemon Scented
features: Quick and Easy Solution: Scented Wardrobe Dehumidifier swiftly removes damp, enhancing air quality effortlessly.
Moisture-Absorbing Crystals: Special crystals draw and trap moisture, reducing condensation and preventing mold and mildew.
Ideal for Small Spaces: Perfect for wardrobes, cupboards, storage boxes, and under sinks with limited air movement.
Versatile Usage: Suitable for caravans and boats during winter months to combat prevalent damp issues.
Simple Disposal: Dispose of carefully when the granules turn to liquid, providing 3-6 weeks of effective use. Not recommended for bathroom use.
description: Scented Wardrobe Dehumidifier is the quick and easy way to help remove damp and improve air quality. The special crystals inside draw moisture and damp from the surrounding atmosphere trapping it inside the dehumidifier. It is especially useful to dry out small spaces with little air movement, reducing condensation and preventing mould and mildew building up. The dehumidifier is ideal for use in wardrobes, cupboards, storage boxes and under sinks where damp is an issue. Can also be used in caravan and boats in winter months when damp is most prevalent. Directions for use: Hang freely in a suitable area. Do not remove or pierce the white layer, this allows moisture in and keeps the crystals safe. Once product has absorbed the full amount of water (when all the granules have turned to liquid), place in a plastic bag and dispose of carefully with general household waste. Dependent on the levels of humidity in the atmosphere, the product may last between 3-6 weeks. Not recommended for use in bathrooms.
